title: Supreme Court asks for details on pending criminal cases in UP, quashes 35-year case
description: The Supreme Court has quashed criminal proceedings pending for over 35 years against a Uttar Pradesh police constable accused of assaulting a fellow constable during Kumbh Mela duty following a dispute over food in a police mess. [Kailash Chandra Kapri v. State of Uttar Pradesh]In a judgment dated April 29, a Bench of Justice JB Pardiwala and Justice Ujjal Bhuyan allowed an appeal filed by police constable Kailash Chandra Kapri (accused) challenging an Allahabad High Court order refusing to quas
